title: poa muktinathensis
intro: Poa muktinathensis is a species of grass native to the Himalayan region, particularly found in the Muktinath Valley in Nepal. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Poa muktinathensis include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
